calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-17-2018 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-17-2018 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned by Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Eric R. Fleming. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6048. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Jonathan Jackel, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Mark Tanoury, who was placed under oath and testified, and for plaintiff Patricia Tanoury, who was not present for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendants Thomas Roberts, Doreen Marie King-Roberts, Internal Revenue Service, Michele L. McGill or the County of San Francisco Department of Child Services.
for plaintiff Tenderloin Neighborhood Development Corporation.
John Stewart, Assistant Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
Thomas Drohan, Esq. appeared for respondent Thomas Drober who was not present at this morning's hearing.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar May-30-2018 Set For Trial On Dec-17-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-16-2018 Set For Trial On Oct-01-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar May-30-2018 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-29-2018 Continued To May-30-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
